title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Tutor/Demonstrator
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Tutor/Demonstrator. Candidates Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 18-05-2026, and closes on 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Nagpur official website.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Tutor/Demonstrator. Candidates Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 18-05-2026, and closes on 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Nagpur official website.

application_fee.details: The maximum age limit is 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Age Relaxation: ST/SC: 05 years OBC: 03 years Persons with Disabilities (General): up to 10 years Persons with Disabilities (OBC): up to 13 years Persons with Disabilities (SC/ST): up to 15 years

age_limit.maximum_age: Not exceeding 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Relaxation for ST/SC: 05 years, OBC: 03 years. PwD: up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST).
age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Relaxation for ST/SC: 05 years, OBC: 03 years. PwD: up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST).
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. Must have completed one year of Compulsory Internship. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the Discipline /allied subject.
qualification.details: Tutor/Demonstrator: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 (persons possessing qualification included in part II or third schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in section 13 (3) of the Act). Must have completed one year of Compulsory Internship. Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the Discipline /allied subject (for Non-Medical Candidates). Experience: One year compulsory internship for medical candidates.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator posts is 01st June 2026 by 05 PM.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Tutor/Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Tutor/Demonstrator position at AIIMS Nagpur.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Tutor/Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: For medical candidates, a recognized medical qualification with a compulsory internship is required. For non-medical candidates, a postgraduate degree in the relevant discipline is necessary.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years as on 01st June 2026, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Tutor/Demonstrator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per the 7th CPC, with a basic pay of Rs. 56100/ (Level-10 and Cell-1) plus other usual allowances.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Tutor/Demonstrator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an MCQ-based written test followed by an interview conducted by a selection committee.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the Tutor/Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/EWS/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, SC/ST candidates Rs. 250/-, and PwD candidates are exempted.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is on a contractual basis for the Tutor/Demonstrator posts.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
